                fvl.append(exp_data["learning_rate_tuning"][k]["losses"]["val"][-1])
                cpd.append(exp_data["learning_rate_tuning"][k]["corrected_pdas"])
            except Exception:
                pass
        if fvl:
            final_val_means.append(np.mean(fvl))
            final_val_ses.append(
                np.std(fvl) / np.sqrt(len(fvl)) if len(fvl) > 1 else 0.0
            )
        else:
            final_val_means.append(np.nan)
            final_val_ses.append(0.0)
        if cpd:
            corrected_pdas_means.append(np.mean(cpd))
            corrected_pdas_ses.append(
                np.std(cpd) / np.sqrt(len(cpd)) if len(cpd) > 1 else 0.0
            )
        else:
            corrected_pdas_means.append(np.nan)
            corrected_pdas_ses.append(0.0)

    x = np.arange(len(LEARNING_RATES))
    for ax, means, ses, ylabel, title in zip(
        axes,
        [final_val_means, corrected_pdas_means],
        [final_val_ses, corrected_pdas_ses],
        ["Final Validation Loss", "Corrected PDAS"],
        [
            "Final Validation Loss by Learning Rate",
            "Corrected PDAS After Recalibration by Learning Rate",
        ],
    ):
        bars = ax.bar(
            x,
            means,
            yerr=ses,
            color=colors,
            edgecolor="black",
            width=0.5,
            capsize=5,
            error_kw={"elinewidth": 2, "ecolor": "black"},
            label="Mean ± SE",
        )
        for bar, v, se in zip(bars, means, ses):
            ax.text(
                bar.get_x() + bar.get_width() / 2,
                bar.get_height() + se + 0.001,
                f"{v:.4f}",
                ha="center",
                va="bottom",
                fontsize=9,
            )
        ax.set_xticks(x)
        ax.set_xticklabels(lr_labels, rotation=15)
        ax.set_ylabel(ylabel)
        ax.set_title(title)
        ax.grid(axis="y", alpha=0.5)
        ax.legend()
    if init_pdas is not None:
        axes[1].axhline(
            y=init_pdas,
            color="gray",
            linestyle=":",
            label=f"Initial PDAS={init_pdas:.3f}",
        )
        axes[1].legend()
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(
        os.path.join(
            working_dir,
            "preference_drift_aggregated_final_valloss_corrected_pdas_bar.png",
        ),
        dpi=120,
    )
    plt.close()
    print("Plot 3 saved.")
    # Print summary metrics
    print("\n--- Summary Metrics (Mean ± SE across runs) ---")
    for i, lr in enumerate(LEARNING_RATES):
        print(
            f"lr={lr}: Final Val Loss = {final_val_means[i]:.4f} ± {final_val_ses[i]:.4f} | "
            f"Corrected PDAS = {corrected_pdas_means[i]:.4f} ± {corrected_pdas_ses[i]:.4f}"
        )
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error creating plot3: {e}")
    plt.close()

# Plot 4: Aggregated Shift Decomposition - PDAS and AI-Induced/Total Shift with SE bands
try:
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
    fig.suptitle(
        "Preference Drift Correction Dataset\n"
        "Aggregated Preference Shift Decomposition (Mean ± SE across runs)",
        fontsize=13,
    )
    pdas_all_r, ai_shifts_all_r, tot_shifts_all_r = [], [], []
    epochs = None
    for exp_data in all_experiment_data:
        try:
            d = exp_data["learning_rate_tuning"][lr_keys[0]]
            epochs = d["epochs"]
            pdas_all_r.append(d["pdas"])
            ai_shifts_all_r.append(d["ai_induced_shifts"])
            tot_shifts_all_r.append(d["total_shifts"])
        except Exception as ex:
            print(f"  Missing shift data for run: {ex}")
    if epochs is not None and len(pdas_all_r) > 0:
        pdas_arr = np.array(pdas_all_r)
        ai_arr = np.array(ai_shifts_all_r)
        tot_arr = np.array(tot_shifts_all_r)
        n = pdas_arr.shape[0]
        pdas_m = pdas_arr.mean(axis=0)
        pdas_s = pdas_arr.std(axis=0) / np.sqrt(n) if n > 1 else np.zeros_like(pdas_m)
        ai_m = ai_arr.mean(axis=0)
        ai_s = ai_arr.std(axis=0) / np.sqrt(n) if n > 1 else np.zeros_like(ai_m)
        tot_m = tot_arr.mean(axis=0)
        tot_s = tot_arr.std(axis=0) / np.sqrt(n) if n > 1 else np.zeros_like(tot_m)
        axes[0].plot(
            epochs,
            pdas_m,
            marker="o",
            color="crimson",
            label="PDAS (Mean)",
            markersize=3,
        )
        axes[0].fill_between(
            epochs,
            pdas_m - pdas_s,
            pdas_m + pdas_s,
            alpha=0.2,
            color="crimson",
            label="±SE",
        )
        if init_pdas is not None:
            axes[0].axhline(
                y=init_pdas,
                color="gray",
                linestyle=":",
                label=f"Initial PDAS={init_pdas:.3f}",
            )
        axes[0].set_xlabel("Epoch")
        axes[0].set_ylabel("PDAS")
        axes[0].set_title("PDAS Over Epochs (Mean ± SE)")
        axes[0].legend()
        axes[0].grid(True)
        axes[1].plot(
            epochs,
            ai_m,
            marker="s",
            color="red",
            label="AI-induced shift (Mean)",
            markersize=3,
        )
        axes[1].fill_between(
            epochs, ai_m - ai_s, ai_m + ai_s, alpha=0.2, color="red", label="±SE (AI)"
        )
        axes[1].plot(
            epochs,
            tot_m,
            marker="^",
            color="steelblue",
            label="Total shift (Mean)",
            markersize=3,
        )
        axes[1].fill_between(
            epochs,
            tot_m - tot_s,
            tot_m + tot_s,
            alpha=0.2,
            color="steelblue",
            label="±SE (Total)",
        )
        axes[1].set_xlabel("Epoch")
        axes[1].set_ylabel("Shift Magnitude")
        axes[1].set_title("AI-Induced vs Total Preference Shift (Mean ± SE)")
        axes[1].legend()
        axes[1].grid(True)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(
        os.path.join(
            working_dir, "preference_drift_aggregated_shift_decomposition_epochs.png"

    print("Plot 4 saved.")
except Exception as e:

    plt.close()

# Plot 5: Aggregated Predicted vs Ground Truth Reward for each Learning Rate (all runs overlaid)
try:
    fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(12, 10))
    fig.suptitle(
        "Preference Drift Correction Dataset\n"
        "Aggregated Predicted vs Ground Truth Reward Scores by Learning Rate (All Runs Overlaid)",
        fontsize=13,
    )
    run_colors_overlay = ["blue", "orange", "green"]
    for i, (lr, ax) in enumerate(zip(LEARNING_RATES, axes.flatten())):
        pearson_rs = []
        for ridx, exp_data in enumerate(all_experiment_data):
            try:
                d = exp_data["learning_rate_tuning"][lr_keys[i]]
                preds = np.array(d["predictions"])
                gt = np.array(d["ground_truth"])
                rc = run_colors_overlay[ridx % len(run_colors_overlay)]
                ax.scatter(gt, preds, alpha=0.2, s=8, color=rc, label=f"Run {ridx+1}")
                r = np.corrcoef(gt, preds)[0, 1]
                pearson_rs.append(r)
            except Exception as ex:
                print(f"  Missing pred/gt data for run {ridx}, lr={lr}: {ex}")
        # Draw ideal line
        ax.set_xlabel("Ground Truth")
        ax.set_ylabel("Predicted")
        if pearson_rs:
            mean_r = np.mean(pearson_rs)
            se_r = (
                np.std(pearson_rs) / np.sqrt(len(pearson_rs))
                if len(pearson_rs) > 1
                else 0.0
            )
            ax.set_title(f"lr={lr} | Mean Pearson r={mean_r:.3f} ± {se_r:.3f}")
            print(f"lr={lr}: Mean Pearson r = {mean_r:.4f} ± {se_r:.4f}")
        else:
            ax.set_title(f"lr={lr}")
        # ideal line using axis limits
        xlim = ax.get_xlim()
        ylim = ax.get_ylim()
        mn = min(xlim[0], ylim[0])
        mx = max(xlim[1], ylim[1])
        ax.plot([mn, mx], [mn, mx], "k--", linewidth=1, label="Ideal")
        ax.legend(fontsize=7)
        ax.grid(True)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(
        os.path.join(
            working_dir, "preference_drift_aggregated_pred_vs_gt_reward_by_lr.png"
        ),
        dpi=120,
    )
    plt.close()
    print("Plot 5 saved.")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error creating plot5: {e}")
    plt.close()
